input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.9
            TITLE: yellow flag (waved) - great danger, slow down, evasive action is most likely required, be

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.9: Yellow Flag (Waved) - Great Danger, SLOW DOWN, evasive action is most likely required, BE
D.4.1.9 Yellow Flag (Waved) - Great Danger, SLOW DOWN, evasive action is most likely required, BE 
PREPARED TO STOP, something has happened beyond the flag station, NO PASSING unless 
directed by the corner workers.

final_answer: rule D.4.1.9: Yellow Flag (Waved) - Great Danger, SLOW DOWN, evasive action is most likely required, BE PREPARED TO STOP, something has happened beyond the flag station, NO PASSING unless directed by the corner workers.
